roles.title: AI Engineer
roles.description: Built AI systems for secure data access, agent workflows, and analytics query generation.
roles.details:
- Built a proxy server for dynamic authentication and authorization for MCP servers integrated with the Dify platform.
- Served as PIC in designing a Data Agent that can analyze, generate, execute, auto-correct, and optimize CubeJS and Trino SQL queries.
- Added a post-processing layer to reduce token usage and complexity, covering around 90% of common financial analytics use cases.
- Used a hybrid public and private LLM approach to improve data privacy.
- Designed an MCP server for RAG, Trino SQL, and CubeJS queries with a custom data ownership protocol for faster management and scaling.

roles.title: AI Engineer
roles.description: Built large-scale ML and ETL systems for social analytics and healthcare AI applications.
roles.details:
- Designed machine learning models for a social analytics platform.
- Built an ETL pipeline using T4 GPUs to process over **300 million** initial records and **200K** new records daily in under **1 hour**.
- Covered information extraction, sentiment analysis, topic classification, and document vectorization with a custom data deduplication algorithm.
- Containerized and deployed pipelines on **Azure Container Instances** and **AzureML**.
- Used **Rust** to achieve **4x** faster processing while reducing memory usage by **4x** for keyword and region extraction tasks.
- Developed an adaptive questionnaire system integrated with an LLM for AI-assisted pre-diagnosis, enabling dynamic symptom-based questioning and probabilistic disease categorization.

roles.title: AI Engineer
roles.description: Continued AI engineering work in a contract role.
roles.details:
- Worked as a contract AI Engineer in a remote setup.
- Continued contributing to AI system development and applied machine learning solutions.

roles.title: AI Engineer
roles.description: Internship at Viettel Information and Technology Center (VIC) during Viettel Digital Talent 2025.
roles.details:
- Designed a generative solution for BI that automatically collects data and generates visualizations.
- Used Agentic AI with in-context learning to generate **Highcharts** configurations for visualization, modification, and personalization.
- Solved around **70%** of questions when using a private LLM.
- Applied PoC distillation and a customized sampling method from **GPT-4.1-mini** generated samples, gaining **15%** overall performance on **Qwen3-4B-Instruct-2507**.
- Ranked **Top 30 out of 150+ teams** in an internal ICPC challenge.

roles.title: DS/AI Intern
roles.description:
Participated in Viettel Digital Talent 2024 program.
Researched machine learning topics about AI in various topic

roles.title: DS/AI Intern
roles.description:
Participated in Viettel Digital Talent 2024 program.
 Researched machine learning topics and built an LLM plus knowledge graph recommendation pipeline.
roles.details:
- Studied and researched machine learning topics including Reinforcement Learning, Quantization, 3D Point Cloud, and LLMs.
- Developed a pipeline using LLMs with a Knowledge Graph for a recommendation system.
- Achieved an average **25% to 50%** improvement compared with traditional methods.
